name: 333D Limited
analysis: T3D's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 84% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.0470, stop A$0.0218, target A$0.0550 (0.32:1) — then trail it.
